title: Desert Tombs
description: Adds a giant Tomb to desert biomes, introducing new mobs: the Scorpion, the Mummy, and a Pharaoh mini-boss.
body:
_Version 2.0.0 Full Mod rework: added giant Desert Tomb Dungeon and more!_

**This mod adds a giant Tomb to desert biomes, introducing new mobs: the Scorpion, the Mummy, and a Pharaoh mini-boss.**


**Structure:**

- Giant Tomb, only found in desert biomes
- Contains 3 new mobs
- Includes hidden loot, secrets, and dangerous traps

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05e6f93b9901fd32d116481b9d4d07161e8a1c07.jpeg)


**New Mobs:**

- Scorpion: stronger variant of the spider.
     Inflicts poison on hit. Drops Scorpion Eyeballs, which can be used to brew Haste Potions.
- Mummy:tougher zombie variant that lurks within the Tomb.
- Pharaoh:
A powerful mini-boss found at the end of the Tomb
Deals high damage and inflicts the Wither effect on hit
Guards the final loot room

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36ead7b6c7763196e43125bcf19bd54c52bcfdc0.jpeg)


**Pharaoh Armor:**

- A unique armor set, Exclusively found in the Tomb

![Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0efcbbc07401c5f3812735fe15f77820e7bf1b37.jpeg)

You are free to include this mod in your modpacks

Made by Leonxkingx
